CustomField.formula: if((NATT_Core__c==true || NATT_DirectDelivery__c ==true || NATT_ItemPriceGroup__c =='123'),true,if((NATT_Sales_Code__c=='S01' || NATT_Sales_Code__c=='SM1' || NATT_Sales_Code__c=='SB1'),if (ISPICKVAL( NAOCAP_Signal_Code_CHI__c, "NLO"),if (ISPICKVAL( NAOCAP_Stocking_Type_UTC_CHI__c,"O"),true,false),ISPICKVAL( NAOCAP_Signal_Code_CHI__c, "S2") || ISPICKVAL( NAOCAP_Signal_Code_CHI__c, "PRC") || ISPICKVAL( NAOCAP_Signal_Code_CHI__c, "FIN") || ISPICKVAL( NAOCAP_Signal_Code_CHI__c, "BY2")),true))
CustomField.label: NAOCAP Not Orderable CHI
